## Phase 8 — Per-card outcome matrix

Source of truth for the 15-question walk (`docs/CARD_AUDIT_QUESTIONS.md`).
Not regenerated by `audit:seed`; edit in place. Outcomes: `pass` / `retext` /
`re-effect` / `rebuild` per `CARD_AUDIT_RULES.md` §7.

Decrees are Pattern A single-action declarations. Q7 (choice distinctness),
Q13 (follow-up shape per branch), and Q14 (cost asymmetry across choices) do
not apply per-card — noted once here rather than repeating N/A in every row.

**Summary**

| Outcome | Count | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| pass | 82 | Tier-1 commons, tactical repeatables, and already-tokenized high-impact/Tier-3 defining decrees. |
| retext | 15 | Q12 progression-memory thread — appended `{ruling_style_note}{recent_causal}` to high-impact decrees that lacked it. |
| re-effect | 0 | KINGDOM_FEATURE_REGISTRY coverage verified; all structural decrees already set features or deliberately don't (repeatable one-shots). |
| rebuild | 0 | No decree failed Q15 authoring self-test. `docs/audit/rebuild-queue.md` unchanged. |
| **total** | **97** | |

**Q-flag tally** (for phase close report cross-check):

- Q12 (progression memory): 15 hits → all retired via token thread.
- Q3 (duplicate check, post Phase 7): 0 hits — `docs/audit/duplicate-reconciliation.md` mapping still holds.
- Q11 (promise↔delivery): 0 hits — scanner green corpus-wide post Phase 4.
- Q15 (authoring self-test): 0 hits — every decree still justifies its monthly-slot presence.
